description: Monitor active entitlement processes and their milestone statuses.

description: Monitor the delivery status of outbound messages sent by workflow rules.

title: Time-Based Automations
description: View and manage pending time-based workflow and process automation actions.

title: Sandboxes
description: Create and manage sandbox environments for development and testing.

title: System Overview
description: View a dashboard of key org limits, storage, and usage metrics.

title: Adoption Assistance
description: Configure adoption assistance features to help users learn Lightning Experience.

title: Guidance Center
description: Configure the Guidance Center panel that surfaces contextual help and learning content.

title: Help Menu
description: Customize the Help menu with org-specific resources and links.

title: In-App Guidance
description: Create and manage in-app prompts and walkthroughs to guide users through features.

title: API
description: Download WSDL files and access API documentation for Salesforce web services.

title: API Catalog
description: Browse and manage a catalog of APIs available for integration.

title: MCP Servers (Integrations)
description: Register and manage Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers for API integrations.

title: Basic Data Import
description: Import data using a simple wizard for basic data loading needs.

title: Change Data Capture
description: Enable Change Data Capture on specific objects to stream record change events.

title: Data Import Wizard
description: Use the guided wizard to import data for standard objects like Contacts and Leads.

title: Data Loader
description: Download and access the Salesforce Data Loader desktop app for bulk data operations.

title: Dataloader.io
description: Access the cloud-based Dataloader.io tool for importing and exporting Salesforce data.

title: External Data Sources
description: Configure external data sources for Salesforce Connect to access data outside Salesforce.

title: External Objects
description: View and manage external objects that represent data from external data sources.

title: External Services
description: Register external REST APIs as External Services to use in Flows and Apex.

title: Named Query API
description: Configure named query APIs for simplified data access patterns.

title: Platform Events
description: Create and manage Platform Event objects for event-driven integrations.

title: Teams Integration
description: Configure the Microsoft Teams integration for Salesforce collaboration features.

title: Custom Notifications
description: Create custom notification types for sending in-app and mobile push notifications.

title: Notification Delivery Settings
description: Configure which channels (desktop, mobile) deliver each notification type.

title: Briefcase Builder
description: Configure Briefcase rules that define which records are available offline in the mobile app.

title: Solution Deployment Monitoring
description: Monitor the deployment status of Go Accelerate solutions across orgs.

title: Business Hours
description: Define your organization's standard business hours for use in escalation rules and entitlements.

title: Public Calendars and Resources
description: Create and manage public calendars and resource calendars for scheduling.

title: Company Information
description: View and edit your organization's name, address, default locale, and license information.

title: Data Protection and Privacy
description: Configure data protection and privacy settings for GDPR and consent management.

title: Fiscal Year
description: Define your organization's fiscal year start month for forecasting and reporting.

title: Holidays
description: Define company holidays that are excluded from business hours calculations.

title: Language Settings
description: Configure the default language and supported languages for the org.

title: Maps and Location Settings
description: Enable and configure Salesforce Maps and location services features.

title: My Domain
description: Set up and manage your org's custom My Domain URL for branding and SSO.

title: Data Classification Download
description: Download a CSV of your org's field-level data classification metadata.

title: Data Classification Settings
description: Configure settings for the Data Classification feature.

title: Data Classification Upload
description: Upload a CSV to bulk-update field-level data classification metadata.

title: Consent Event Stream
description: View and manage the stream of consent change events for privacy compliance.

title: Auth Providers
description: Configure third-party authentication providers (e.g., Google, Facebook) for social sign-on.

title: Identity Provider
description: Enable Salesforce as a SAML Identity Provider for other applications.

title: Identity Provider Event Log
description: View the log of SAML identity provider events and errors.

description: Configure identity verification methods (SMS, TOTP) for multi-factor authentication.

title: Identity Verification History
description: View the history of identity verification attempts by users.

title: Login Flows
description: Create Flow-based login flows that run after user authentication.

title: Login History
description: View a log of all login attempts to the org, including successes and failures.

title: OAuth Custom Scopes
description: Create custom OAuth scopes to grant fine-grained access to connected apps.

description: Configure org-wide settings for OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect behavior.

title: Single Sign-On Settings
description: Configure SAML-based Single Sign-On settings for the org.

title: Token Exchange Handlers
description: Configure Apex handlers for OAuth token exchange flows.

title: Activations
description: View and manage trusted IP addresses and browsers that have been activated by users.

title: CORS
description: Add trusted origins to the CORS allowlist to permit cross-origin API requests.

title: Certificate and Key Management
description: Create and manage digital certificates and keys for encryption and authentication.

title: Delegated Administration
description: Configure delegated administrator groups to allow non-admin users to manage specific users.

title: Event Log File Browser
description: Browse and download Event Monitoring log files for security and usage analysis.

title: Event Monitoring Settings
description: Enable and configure Event Monitoring for tracking user activity log files.

title: Expire All Passwords
description: Force all users to reset their passwords at their next login.

title: Field Accessibility
description: View and compare field-level security settings across profiles and permission sets.

description: Configure which file types can be uploaded or downloaded to prevent security risks.

title: Health Check

title: Login Access Policies
description: Configure policies that control administrator login access to user accounts.

title: Named Credentials
description: Create named credentials to securely store authentication details for external callouts.

title: Network Access
description: Define trusted IP ranges that allow users to log in without identity verification.

title: Password Policies
description: Configure password complexity, expiration, and lockout policies for the org.

title: Private Connect
description: Configure Private Connect for secure, private network connectivity to Salesforce.

title: Remote Site Settings
description: Allowlist external URLs that Salesforce is permitted to make callouts to.

title: Session Management
description: View and terminate active user sessions in the org.

title: Session Settings
description: Configure session timeout, security levels, and other session-related security settings.

title: Sharing Settings
description: Configure org-wide default sharing settings and sharing rules for all objects.

description: View violations of Content Security Policy (CSP) and trusted URL rules.

title: Trusted URLs for Redirects
description: Allowlist external URLs that Salesforce is permitted to redirect users to.

title: View Setup Audit Trail
description: View a log of recent configuration changes made in Setup for auditing purposes.
